title: Decision index
description: Machine-readable register of every architecture decision in scope at the current milestone. Pairs with docs/governance/decision_backlog.md (narrative) and docs/adr/, docs/rfc/ (decision records). Tooling reads this file; no silent blanks are allowed. Every decision row MUST carry a commitment class, target milestone, evidence owner, freeze date, a default-if-unresolved posture, an owner, and either a backup owner or an active waiver.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this document. Increment on breaking field changes.

assumptions.description: Assumption rows referenced by decision entries via linked_assumptions.

dependencies.description: Dependency rows referenced by decision entries via linked_dependencies.

decisions.description: Decision rows. Each row represents one decision that must be closed (or explicitly narrowed by default) before its freeze deadline.

decision_id.description: Stable decision identifier. Do not reuse when a decision is superseded; mint a new id and point superseded_by at it.

target_milestone.description: Milestone slug the decision is scoped to. Must match the slug convention used in artifacts/governance/scorecards/.

freeze_by_milestone.description: Milestone slug by which the decision MUST be closed or narrowed. May equal target_milestone.

freeze_by_date.description: Calendar freeze. On this date, if status is still open or deciding, default_if_unresolved applies automatically.

decision_deadline.description: Soft deadline: the forum's target for closing the decision before the freeze. Earlier than or equal to freeze_by_date.

evidence_owner.description: Named evidence owner for the proof, narrowing note, or follow-on packet that closes or justifies this decision.

backup_waiver.description: Waiver id from ownership_matrix.waivers, required when backup_owner is null.

forum.description: Decision forum id from ownership_matrix.decision_forums that owns closure of this decision.

related_requirement_ids.description: Requirement ids from the PRD or other source-of-truth documents, e.g. PRD-FOO-001.

source_anchors.description: Pointers into source documents that motivate this decision. Used so the decision can be traced back without restating the spec.

affected_artifacts.description: Repo-relative paths or lane ids whose behaviour or contracts this decision will freeze or change.

linked_assumptions.description: Assumption ids this decision depends on.

linked_dependencies.description: Dependency ids this decision depends on.

linked_adr.description: Repo-relative path to the ADR that closes this decision. Null while the decision is open.

linked_rfc.description: Repo-relative path to the RFC exploring this decision, if one exists. Null otherwise.

superseded_by.description: Decision ids that supersede this row. Non-empty only when status is superseded.

decision_history.description: Append-only history of status transitions. Never rewrite entries; add new ones.

allOf.description: Every decision row must name a backup owner or cite an active waiver.
superseded_by MUST be non-empty when status is superseded.
linked_adr MUST be set when status is decided.

anchor.description: Line number, heading slug, or other stable anchor inside the referenced document.

posture.description: What happens automatically if the freeze date passes with the decision unresolved. narrow = reduce committed scope; defer = push the decision to a later milestone with a restated freeze; freeze_lane = block all dependent work on the affected lane; rebaseline = trigger a milestone rebaseline review.

description.description: Concrete statement of what narrowing / deferral / freeze / rebaseline means for this specific decision.

applies_on.description: Date on which the posture applies automatically if the decision is still open. Normally equal to freeze_by_date.

requires_approval_from.description: Forum ids whose approval is needed to override the default posture. Empty means the default is automatic.
